steps.title: Read the graph at x = 60
steps.content: The question asks for the cost when the manufacturer makes $60$ rings. Locate $x=60$ on the horizontal axis, move up to the line, and read the corresponding $y$-value.

steps.title: Read the cost
steps.content: At $x=60$, the line is at $y=175$. Since $y$ is measured in dollars, the cost is $175$.
